source_name: BITRE Airport Traffic Data - capital city airport passenger movements
notes: Manual entry from BITRE Airport Traffic Data 1985-86 to 2024-25 workbook. The value sums total revenue passenger movements for the eight capital city airports in 2024-25. It excludes non-capital airports and is an annual financial-year total, not a monthly total.
citation: Bureau of Infrastructure and Transport Research Economics, Airport Traffic Data 1985-86 to 2024-25.

fields.source_workbook: Airport Traffic Data 1985-86 to 2024-25 - financial years
